body.title: D335 Phase 2: Igor registers with utility closet
body.result: D335 Phase 2 complete: Igor registers as utility closet client on boot, pushes stats every 5s, forwards messages through platform, deregisters on shutdown. 18 tests. Non-breaking — Igor works normally if utility closet isn't running.
body.description: Refactor Igor server.py: on boot, register with utility closet via REST. Push stats periodically. Deregister on shutdown. Chat messages route through utility closet. Igor becomes a client, not the server owner.
